title: The Odyssey
overview: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.
description: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

title: Moana
overview: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui.
description: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui.

title: Obsession
overview: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for.
description: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for.

title: Backrooms
overview: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.
description: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

title: Toy Story 5
overview: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder.
description: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder.

title: Project Hail Mary
overview: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there.
description: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there.

title: The Mandalorian and Grogu
overview: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy.
description: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy.

title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
overview: In the wake of the devastating war against the RDA and the loss of their eldest son, Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora.
description: In the wake of the devastating war against the RDA and the loss of their eldest son, Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora.

title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
overview: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr.
description: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr.

title: Interstellar
overview: The adventures of a group of explorers who make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel.
description: The adventures of a group of explorers who make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
overview: Imprisoned in the 1940s for the double murder of his wife and her lover, upstanding banker Andy Dufresne begins a new life at the Shawshank prison.
description: Imprisoned in the 1940s for the double murder of his wife and her lover, upstanding banker Andy Dufresne begins a new life at the Shawshank prison.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime. With the help of Lt. Jim Gordon and District Attorney Harvey Dent, Batman sets out to dismantle the remaining criminal organizations.
description: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime. With the help of Lt. Jim Gordon and District Attorney Harvey Dent, Batman sets out to dismantle the remaining criminal organizations.

title: Inception
overview: Cobb, a skilled thief who commits corporate espionage by infiltrating the subconscious of his targets is offered a chance to regain his old life.
description: Cobb, a skilled thief who commits corporate espionage by infiltrating the subconscious of his targets is offered a chance to regain his old life.

title: Moana 2
overview: After receiving an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors, Moana journeys alongside Maui and a new crew.
description: After receiving an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors, Moana journeys alongside Maui and a new crew.

title: Jurassic World Rebirth
overview: Five years after the events of Jurassic World Dominion, covert operations expert Zora Bennett is contracted to lead a skilled team.
description: Five years after the events of Jurassic World Dominion, covert operations expert Zora Bennett is contracted to lead a skilled team.
